Creates new Tenant objects in the system and makes them immediately available.
data.reasoning: Original description is too vague for bulk operations. Added clarity on the input format (array of tenant data), specified required fields, detailed the response structure with success/failure counts, and explained the side effect that tenants are created and immediately available. This helps AI agents understand the operation's scope and error handling.
